source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

upper_city.name: Tower of the Winds
upper_city.detail: Tallest fortification in the city, topped by a weathervane and with a visible sundial.

upper_city.name: Temple of Orlanth Thunderous
upper_city.detail: Lightning-struck outcropping and major temple site restored after Lunar destruction.

upper_city.name: Temple of Orlanth Adventurous
upper_city.detail: Major temple with shrines to Mastakos and Yinkin.

upper_city.name: Temple of Chalana Arroy
upper_city.detail: House of Mercy, major temple-hospital and one of the largest Chalana Arroy temples in Sartar.

upper_city.name: Public Bath
upper_city.detail: Part of the Chalana Arroy complex and open to any creature not of Chaos.

upper_city.name: Temple of Ernalda
upper_city.detail: Ornate Earth Rune-shaped temple with shrines to Asrelia, Babeester Gor, Maran Gor, and Voria.

upper_city.name: Council House
upper_city.detail: Meeting place of the City Ring.

upper_city.name: Temple of Humakt
upper_city.detail: Minor temple and mercenary hiring house.

upper_city.name: Temple of Sartar and Orlanth Rex
upper_city.detail: Major temple where Hauberk Jon, the city wyter, resides.

upper_city.name: Temple of Lhankor Mhy
upper_city.detail: The Jonstown Library, a great temple, archive, and major intellectual landmark.

upper_city.name: Seven Mothers Temple Ruins
upper_city.detail: Ruined Lunar temple burned during the city's liberation.

scholars_quarter.name: Temple of Uleria
scholars_quarter.detail: Love goddess temple with public and private ceremonies and baths.

scholars_quarter.name: The Back Door
scholars_quarter.detail: Shadowy tavern suited to discreet meetings and illegal purchases.

scholars_quarter.name: The Gilded Beard
scholars_quarter.detail: Inn favored by Free Sages and known for Jonstown ice beer.

scholars_quarter.name: South Market
scholars_quarter.detail: Book Market where scrolls, parchment, and writing supplies are traded.

merchants_quarter.name: Temple of Issaries
merchants_quarter.detail: Major temple overseeing trade, loans, witnessed agreements, and merchant disputes.

merchants_quarter.name: Temple of Lokarnos
merchants_quarter.detail: Small but well-furnished trade god temple.

merchants_quarter.name: The Black Alynx
merchants_quarter.detail: Popular inn with adventurers, traders, and Free Sages.

merchants_quarter.name: Bull and Ram
merchants_quarter.detail: Favored inn for caravans arriving from Tarsh.

merchants_quarter.name: North Market
merchants_quarter.detail: Also called the Meat Market, for livestock and butchers.

merchants_quarter.name: Great Market
merchants_quarter.detail: Main caravan market for distant goods.

merchants_quarter.name: Public Bath
merchants_quarter.detail: Most commonly used public bath in the city.

crafters_quarter.summary: The Crafter's Quarter includes workshops, bakeries, guild spaces, inns, ordinary residences, and much of the city's practical economic life.

shopping_and_services.summary: Book 2 provides price guidance for common goods and services such as clothes, food, guards, heralds, horses, rooms, labor, research, sacrifice, tools, and torches.

healing_for_hire.summary: The Chalana Arroy temple offers suggested donation rates for natural treatment and magical healing, with spell references cross-linked to Book 1: Rules.
